basic_info.title: Metal Gear Solid 3: Snake Eater
basic_info.review: IGN praised the game for its intense survival elements and the seamless integration of stealth and action, calling it a masterpiece of the genre.

alternative_names: Metal Gear Solid 3: Snake Eater HD Edition
METAL GEAR SOLID Δ: SNAKE EATER

previous_game.title: Metal Gear Solid 2: Sons of Liberty

next_game.title: Metal Gear Solid 4: Guns of the Patriots

similar_games.title: Metal Gear Solid 2: Sons of Liberty
Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain

play_today.details: The definitive original version with exclusive Subsistence content including the revolutionary third-person camera mode, Snake vs. Monkey minigame, and Metal Gear Online multiplayer. Digital Foundry analysis confirms superior lighting effects compared to all remasters. Runs at native 60fps throughout gameplay.

recommended_patches.name: Widescreen Patch
recommended_patches.description: Unlocks 16:9 aspect ratio for modern displays while maintaining gameplay integrity

recommended_patches.name: FPS Unlocker (PC version)
recommended_patches.description: Removes artificial framerate cap for smoother gameplay on modern systems

optimal_settings: EE Cycle Rate: 100% for accurate performance

play_today.details: Modern PC version with community mods that restore and enhance the experience. Digital Foundry notes this runs at fixed 720p without AA by default, but MGSHDFix provides comprehensive improvements including custom resolutions up to native 4K, ultrawide support, and bug fixes.

recommended_patches.name: MGSHDFix v2.4+
recommended_patches.description: Essential fix adding custom resolutions up to native 4K, ultrawide support (including 21:9), fixes crashes and resolution scaling bugs, enables mod support

recommended_patches.name: HD Textures AI Slop Mod
recommended_patches.description: Upscales textures to 4K while preserving original art style - highly recommended for jungle environments

recommended_patches.name: MGS3 Audio Fix
recommended_patches.description: Restores proper audio quality and fixes audio sync issues in cutscenes

play_today.details: 2023 Master Collection version with Patch 2.0 improvements. Offers native 1080p rendering with FSR upscaling to 4K, plus High Resolution movie mode for pre-rendered cutscenes. PS5 offers superior texture filtering compared to Xbox Series X.

recommended_patches.name: Patch 2.0 Update
recommended_patches.description: Essential update adding resolution settings up to 1080p native with FSR upscaling options and High Resolution movie mode

play_today.details: The 2011 HD remaster based on the Subsistence version. Runs at native 720p with 60fps target. Lacks some PS2-exclusive content but offers improved resolution over original.
Digital Foundry analysis reveals this runs at native 720p with minimal anti-aliasing and no texture filtering. Frame-rate capped at 30fps with occasional drops below target in intense scenes.

recommended_patches.name: Patch 2.0 Update
recommended_patches.description: Improves frame-rate stability compared to launch build, though sub-30fps drops remain in some sections

play_today.details: Portable version with touch controls and gyro aiming. Includes all Subsistence content but lacks Metal Gear Online multiplayer.

The definitive modern experience via the Master Collection. Features native 4K resolution, 60 FPS performance, and fully remastered textures. Includes all Subsistence content like the Peace Walker demo and extra difficulty modes. Offers modern controller support, cloud saves, and quick resume functionality. The only version with properly rendered textures and no audio compression issues found in HD ports.

recommended_patches.name: MGSHDFix
recommended_patches.description: A community-created fix for the Metal Gear Solid Master Collection on PS5/PC that enables custom resolutions, ultrawide monitor support, and fixes various graphical glitches not present in the base release.

recommended_patches.name: MGS3 FPS Unlock Mod
recommended_patches.description: An experimental modification that allows the Master Collection version to run at framerates above or below the locked 60 FPS, providing smoother motion for high-refresh-rate displays.

play_today.details: The original definitive experience, specifically the 'Subsistence' version (2006 releases). Includes the Peace Walker demo, extra difficulty modes, and the original uncompressed soundtrack. While limited to 480i resolution and 30 FPS, it offers the most authentic gameplay feel with pressure-sensitive buttons. Best played via emulation for widescreen support and save states, or on a PS3 with backward compatibility.

recommended_patches.name: MGS3 Widescreen PPF Patch
recommended_patches.description: A PPF patch specifically for the Metal Gear Solid 3: Subsistence PS2 ISO that enables 16:9 widescreen aspect ratio, removes black bars, and adjusts the camera for a modern viewing experience.

recommended_patches.name: MGS3 60 FPS Code Patch
recommended_patches.description: A cheat code patch (PNATCH) for the PS2 version that unlocks the frame rate from 30 FPS to 60 FPS, significantly improving gameplay smoothness when used with PCSX2 or compatible hardware.

recommended_patches.name: PS2 Patch Engine
recommended_patches.description: A utility tool for applying various byte, short, and word patches to PS2 game images, essential for applying custom modifications like widescreen or region fixes to MGS3.

optimal_settings: Widescreen Hack: Enabled (if not using PPF patch)
Frame Limiting: Off (for 60 FPS patch usage)
Renderer: Vulkan or OpenGL for best performance

play_today.details: The HD Collection version offers a middle ground with 720p resolution and widescreen support. It includes the full Subsistence content and uncompressed audio, unlike the Xbox 360 port. However, it is locked to 30 FPS and lacks the texture improvements of the Master Collection. Recommended only for those who own a PS3 and prefer physical media over the modern remaster.

recommended_patches.name: MGS3 HD Widescreen PPF Patch
recommended_patches.description: A patch for the PS3 HD Collection ISO that ensures proper 16:9 widescreen rendering and fixes minor graphical artifacts present in the original HD port.

description.synopsis: Set in 1964 during the height of the Cold War, the game follows Naked Snake, a young special forces operative sent on a mission to stop a rogue Soviet faction from stealing a nuclear weapon. Snake must infiltrate the jungle, survive the harsh environment, and confront his mentor, The Boss, in a battle that will define his future.
key_features: Survival mechanics requiring hunting and skinning animals for food and camouflage
Dynamic camouflage system where players must match their suit to the environment
CQC (Close Quarters Combat) system allowing for silent takedowns and interrogations
Binoculars used for reconnaissance, tagging enemies, and identifying wildlife
Snake's physical condition system affecting stamina, health, and vision
Non-lethal takedown options and the ability to capture enemies alive
Multiple endings based on player choices and performance
Boss battles against unique 'Legion' enemies with distinct behaviors
Integration of the 'Fox Engine' in the Delta remake for enhanced visuals and physics
legacy_and_impact: Metal Gear Solid 3: Snake Eater is widely regarded as one of the greatest video games of all time, setting a new standard for stealth-action games. Its introduction of survival mechanics and the 'Fox Engine' in the Delta remake have influenced countless subsequent titles in the genre.
